options.content:
Individual V. Rubin Transfers
  • This dashboard shows file level data, given a particular source and destination organization.
  • The table shows the volume, rate, duration (in hours, minutes and seconds) for the top 1000 largest files.
  • Click on the timestamp of an individual transfer to show more detailed information about that transfer.
  • IPs have been de-identified.
  • All times are displayed in browser local time.

value.title: Show more information about this task
Show more information about this file

panels.title: File Transfers from Source to Destination (Reverse)

targets.query: meta.src_organization:$dest AND meta.dst_organization:$src AND meta.dst_resource_name:$src_resource AND (${internal:raw}(meta.src_organization:$src AND meta.dst_organization:$src)) AND (meta.src_organization:${confidential:raw} AND meta.dst_organization:${confidential:raw}) AND meta.sensor_id:$sensors AND ((!(_exists_:meta.country_scope)) OR meta.country_scope:$country_scope) AND (( (!(_exists_:meta.src_ip)) OR meta.src_ip:${subnet.regex}*) OR ( (!(_exists_:meta.dst_ip)) OR meta.dst_ip:${subnet.regex}*))
